svg.text: Wave 3 setups fit drawdown rules perfectly · 2-4 setups/month → 8% profit target in 5-8 weeks

g.text: Why Elliott fits prop firm rules
→ Wave 3 entries have defined stop (below W1 start) — fits any drawdown
→ Avg 3-5R per trade — fast path to 8% profit target
→ 2-4 setups per month per major index — low trade count fits Apex DLL rules
→ Works on NQ, ES, GC, CL, MES, MNQ — all major prop firm symbols
Realistic pass rate with disciplined Elliott: 32-40% (vs 8-12% industry average)
Week 1-2 · Identify Primary degree wave count on NQ + ES daily charts
Week 3-5 · Wait for W2 or W4 retracement on 4H · enter on bullish reversal candle
Week 6-7 · Trail stop to break-even after 2R · partial at 3R · hold final 50% to 1.618 target
Week 8 · If profit target hit, STOP TRADING — preserve the pass
Target: 2-3 winning W3 trades × 3R = 9% account growth = challenge passed
